brand_identity.name: HabitGen
brand_identity.mission: Ignite your potential. Build streaks. Burn bad habits.

typography.installation_instructions: Add imports for Barlow Condensed (weights 700, 800, 900) and Manrope (400, 500, 600, 700) from Google Fonts.

usage_rules.background: ALWAYS pure black (#000000) or very dark zinc (#09090b) for OLED savings.
usage_rules.text: White for headings, Zinc-400 for secondary text. NEVER pure grey.
usage_rules.brand: Use the Fire Gradient for primary actions (Start, Complete, Subscribe).
usage_rules.feedback: Green for success, Red for missed streaks (but keep it motivational, not punishing).

container.desktop: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-black border-x border-zinc-800

spacing_layout.grid_system: Use Flexbox (col) for main layout. Grid for stats (2 columns).

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:opacity-90 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(249,115,22,0.4)]

cards.habit_card: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl mb-3 backdrop-blur-md active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
cards.stat_card: flex flex-col p-5 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl

navigation.bottom_tab: fixed bottom-6 left-4 right-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-full h-16 flex items-center justify-around shadow-2xl z-50

inputs.base: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-white focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 placeholder:text-zinc-600 h-12

special.streak_flame: Animated flame icon. Scales up when streak increases.
special.progress_ring: Circular progress bar with orange gradient stroke.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use extensively for overlays, modals, and the bottom nav.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise texture opacity-5 to the background to avoid flat black.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Lucide React' or 'Phosphor Icons' (Duotone). Fire icon MUST be filled when active.

images.description: Silhouette of man running, use for onboarding 'Physical' category
Woman reading book, use for 'Mental' category
Buddha statue dark, use for 'Spirit/Mindfulness' category
Glass of water, use for 'Health' category

micro_interactions.checkbox_check: Explosive scale up then settle (bounce effect)
micro_interactions.page_transition: Slide up (mobile style) or Fade in

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on orange backgrounds is White or Black depending on orange shade. Use APCA.
accessibility.screen_reader: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines.rule_1: NO gradients on text unless it's a large headline.
universal_guidelines.rule_2: Don't center everything. Left align text for readability, center align containers for mobile view.
universal_guidelines.rule_4: Avoid 'AI Slop' - generic layouts. Use asymmetry where possible, even in lists (e.g., stagger animations).
universal_guidelines.rule_5: Dark mode is PRIMARY. Do not build a light mode unless explicitly toggled (hidden feature).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React Native Expo app (or React Web equivalent if constrained).
2. Install Tailwind CSS via NativeWind or standard PostCSS depending on environment.
3. Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'clsx' 'tailwind-merge' for utils.
4. Create a 'components/ui' folder and implement the HabitCard and FireButton first.
5. Use the provided Image URLs for the Onboarding slides.
6. Implement the Bottom Tab navigation with the glassmorphism style defined in 'navigation'.
7. Ensure the background is always #000000 or #09090b.
8. Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all Headers (H1-H3) and 'Manrope' for Body.
